description: Letter of a foreign scholar who was afraid of being forced to marry, although he did not wish to do so, because of his mother and daughter, and who refused to become judge and teacher in Alexandria because he was in charge of a house with tenants in Fustat, belonging to a friend. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכתב מחוקר זר שחשש להיאלץ להינשא, סירב לשמש שופט ומורה באלכסנדריה בשל אחריותו לבית עם שוכרים בפוסטאט.
